title: Monday.com is cutting 20 percent of its workforce as it pivots to an AI work platform
summary: Monday.com plans to cut about 620 jobs, 20 percent of staff, as it restructures around its AI-driven growth strategy and flatter organisation Monday.com is cutting roughly 20 percent of its global workforce, about 620 people, as the Israeli project management company restructures…
